pois.source: OpenStreetMap amenities + Vicmap/MapShare facility points (police, childcare, hospitals) via scripts/build-poi.ts

noise.source: OpenStreetMap rail / tram / freeway corridors (transport-noise proximity proxy) via scripts/fetch-noise.ts

traffic.source: DTP Annual Average Daily Traffic Volume via scripts/fetch-traffic-aadt.ts
traffic.attribution: (c) State of Victoria (Department of Transport and Planning)

bus.source: PTV GTFS Schedule weekday bus stops via scripts/precompute-gtfs.ts
